table-275-275.caption: List the toxicology elements associated with molecule TR001.
data: Measures the toxicity of a substance when administered orally in a single dose.
Measures the toxicity of a substance when applied to the skin in a single dose.
Assesses the potential of a substance to cause irritation or corrosion to the skin.
Assesses the potential of a substance to cause irritation or corrosion to the eyes.
Assesses the potential of a substance to cause damage to genetic material.
Ames Test Result, Chromosome Aberration Assay Result
